name: NOWA

intro.headline: [ The one-line premise of the project. ]
intro.body: [ Two or three sentences: who the client is, what they came to OOVERT for, and the shift you were hired to make. Keep it human and specific — roughly 45 words. ]

statement: [ The idea the whole brand hangs on, in one bold line — the sentence you would defend in the room. ]
closing: [ One closing line — the result, or a thank-you to the client. ]

logo.headline: [ A short line about the logo idea. ]

construction.headline: [ How the mark is built. ]
notes: [ Note one — the grid, the proportion, the angle. What rule governs it? ]
[ Note two — the decision that took the longest, and why it was worth it. ]
[ Note three — how it behaves small, or in one colour. ]

typography.headline: [ The typeface and why it fits. ]

graphic.headline: [ The pattern, icon set, or device. ]

card.headline: [ A note on the print details. ]
